name: inspect
description: Query engine state. Call with no arguments to get a full runtime state dump (working directory, active tiers, registered servers, data directory). Optionally specify a target for a focused query.

target.description: What to inspect. Omit for full state dump.

key.description: Optional filter key. For 'identity': tier name. For 'tool': tool name. For 'config': config section. For 'docs': section name. For 'history': max entries.
